response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong web/backend credentials, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (not listed), embedded firmware/LAN-switch security experience, and strong C for UNIX with Linux kernel modification work — none of which appear in the resume. Skills like MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, and chip-vendor SDKs are absent.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development experience across multiple stacks
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement: native-level)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)
No Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK experience; C is not a primary skill
